message.content:
Read and analyze the file at /Users/canerden/Downloads/habitat-homepage.html. I need:
1. The overall structure and sections present
2. Color scheme / design tokens (CSS variables, colors used)
3. What "products" are mentioned (evenings, hackathons, residency)
4. Any existing image references or placeholders
5. The tech stack used (plain HTML/CSS/JS? any frameworks?)
6. Current fonts, typography choices
7. How many sections/pages are in the file
8. Whether there are any JavaScript libraries included

Please be thorough - this is the main file we'll be working with.

content.text: I'll analyze the HTML file thoroughly for you.

Perfect! I've analyzed the file thoroughly. Here's a comprehensive breakdown of the Habitat homepage: ## 1. **Overall Structure and Sections** The file is a single-page website (1,050 lines) with 10 main sections: 1. **Navigation** (fixed header with logo and links) 2. **Hero section** (main headline and CTA) 3. **Stats bar** (6 key metrics) 4. **Photo strip** (scrolling event photos carousel) 5. **Products/Programs** (3 cards: Evenings, Hackathons, Residency) 6. **Funnel/Pipeline** (conversion funnel visualization) 7. **Logos section** (participant organizations) 8. **Why Habitat** (3-column value proposition) 9. **Testimonials** (3 testimonial cards) 10. **CTA section** (final call-to-action) 11. **Footer** (4-column layout with links and copyright) --- ## 2. **Color Scheme & Design Tokens** All colors defined as CSS variables in `:root`: | Variable | Value | Purpose | |----------|-------|---------| | `--black` | #0a0a0a | Background | | `--white` | #f5f2eb | Main text | | `--cream` | #ede9df | Testimonial text | | `--gray` | #8a8780 | Secondary text | | `--gray-light` | #c4c1b8 | Lighter text | | `--accent` | #3d5afc | Habitat blue (primary) | | `--accent-glow` | #5b74ff | Hover state for accent | | `--coral` | #ff6b4a | Accent accent color | | `--teal` | #1dd4a0 | Evenings product accent | | `--purple` | #a374ff | Residency product accent | **Design philosophy:** Dark mode with high contrast. Accent colors differentiate the three products. --- ## 3. **Products Mentioned** The three "products" are clearly defined: | Product | Duration | Details | Accent Color | |---------|----------|---------|--------------| | **Habitat Evenings** | 3-4 hours | Free/sponsored, 40 builders per event, 4 cities in Belgium | Teal (#1dd4a0) | | **Technical Hackathons** | Full day | VC-sponsored, teams of 2-3, for technical founders | Blue (#3d5afc) | | **Habitat Residency** | 7 days | Coming 2026, 5 live-in founders, dedicated mentorship, demo day | Purple (#a374ff) | --- ## 4. **Image References & Placeholders** **Photo Strip (Lines 782-796):** - 5 photo placeholders with names: `event-photo-1.jpg` through `event-photo-5.jpg` - Duplicated 5 times for infinite scroll effect - Instructions provided to replace with actual images: `` - Placeholder styling: 340px × 220px, rounded corners **Logo Section (Lines 897-905):** - 7 logo placeholders: Google, Vlerick, KPMG, KU Leuven, imec, McKinsey, Deloitte - Instructions to replace with: `` **Testimonial Avatars (Lines 950-951, 962-963, 974):** - 3 avatar placeholders (44px × 44px circular) - First two named (Leon, Vincent), third is template - Instructions to replace with: `` --- ## 5. **Tech Stack** - **Pure HTML5** - no frameworks - **Vanilla CSS3** - all styling in `
